sentence: Vos sabés que el zorro azul corre por el llano.
ipa: ˈboh saˈβeh ke el ˈsoro aˈsul ˈkore poɾ el ˈʝano
gloss_en: You know the blue fox runs across the plain.
notes: seseo ⟨c/z⟩ merged to [s]; yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; strong-R trill [r]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. voseo (sabés); Nicaraguan Pacific speech per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Tomá los mangos y vení para el patio.
ipa: toˈma loh ˈmanɡoh i beˈni paɾa el ˈpatjo
gloss_en: Take the mangoes and come to the yard.
notes: coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. voseo imperatives (tomá, vení) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: El chavalo tiene un perro grande y bravo.
ipa: el tʃaˈβalo ˈtjene uŋ ˈpero ˈɡɾande i ˈbɾaβo
gloss_en: The kid has a big, fierce dog.
notes: tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; strong-R trill [r]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. Nicaraguan 'chavalo' for a child per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Mañana el niño juega en la plaza con vos.
ipa: maˈɲana el ˈniɲo ˈxweɣa eŋ la ˈplasa koŋ ˈboh
gloss_en: Tomorrow the boy plays in the square with you.
notes: seseo ⟨c/z⟩ merged to [s]; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. voseo (con vos) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: La calle está llena de gente joven.
ipa: la ˈkaʝe eˈhta ˈʝena de ˈxente ˈxoβeŋ
gloss_en: The street is full of young people.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general Nicaraguan usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: ¿Querés arroz con pollo o preferís gallo pinto?
ipa: keˈɾeh aˈros koŋ ˈpoʝo o pɾefeˈɾih ˈɡaʝo ˈpinto
gloss_en: Do you want rice with chicken or gallo pinto?
notes: seseo ⟨c/z⟩ merged to [s]; yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; strong-R trill [r]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. voseo (querés); Nicaraguan 'gallo pinto' per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Buscá unos zapatos nuevos en aquel mercado.
ipa: buˈhka unoh saˈpatoh ˈnweβoh eŋ aˈkel meˈɾkaðo
gloss_en: Look for some new shoes in that market.
notes: seseo ⟨c/z⟩ merged to [s]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. voseo imperative (buscá) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: La lluvia cae fuerte sobre los tejados viejos.
ipa: la ˈʝuβja ˈkae ˈfweɾte ˈsobɾe loh teˈxaðoh ˈbjexoh
gloss_en: The rain falls hard on the old roofs.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Nosotros queremos una casa buena y barata.
ipa: noˈsotɾoh keˈɾemoh una ˈkasa ˈbwena i baˈɾata
gloss_en: We want a good, cheap house.
notes: coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: El camión rojo corre rápido por la carretera.
ipa: el kaˈmioŋ ˈroxo ˈkore ˈrapiðo poɾ la kareˈteɾa
gloss_en: The red truck runs fast along the highway.
notes: final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; strong-R trill [r] per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Ese señor tiene bastante tierra en la montaña.
ipa: ˈese seˈɲoɾ ˈtjene baˈhtante ˈtjera eŋ la moˈntaɲa
gloss_en: That man has plenty of land on the mountain.
notes: palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; strong-R trill [r]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: No vayás solo, andá con los muchachos.
ipa: ˈno baˈʝah ˈsolo aˈnda koŋ loh muˈtʃatʃoh
gloss_en: Don't go alone, go with the guys.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. voseo negative imperative (vayás, andá) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Las manzanas y las naranjas están en la mesa.
ipa: lah maˈnsanah i lah naˈɾanxah eˈhtaŋ eŋ la ˈmesa
gloss_en: The apples and oranges are on the table.
notes: seseo ⟨c/z⟩ merged to [s]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: ¿Vos vivís lejos del parque nuevo?
ipa: ˈboh biˈβih ˈlexoh del ˈpaɾke ˈnweβo
gloss_en: Do you live far from the new park?
notes: coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. voseo (vivís) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Los caballos blancos pastan junto al arroyo.
ipa: loh kaˈβaʝoh ˈblankoh ˈpahtaŋ ˈxunto al aˈroʝo
gloss_en: The white horses graze by the stream.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; strong-R trill [r]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Comprá pan y guardá un poco para después.
ipa: koˈmpɾa ˈpaŋ i ɡwaˈɾda uŋ ˈpoko paɾa deˈhpueh
gloss_en: Buy bread and save some for later.
notes: coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. voseo imperatives (comprá, guardá) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Esos zapatos viejos ya no sirven para nada.
ipa: ˈesoh saˈpatoh ˈbjexoh ˈʝa ˈno ˈsiɾbeŋ paɾa ˈnaða
gloss_en: Those old shoes are no good for anything anymore.
notes: seseo ⟨c/z⟩ merged to [s]; yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Aquella niña baila con mucha alegría.
ipa: aˈkeʝa ˈniɲa ˈbajla koŋ ˈmutʃa aleˈɡɾia
gloss_en: That girl dances with great joy.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Tenés que llamar a tus amigos temprano.
ipa: teˈneh ke ʝaˈmaɾ a tuh aˈmiɣoh teˈmpɾano
gloss_en: You have to call your friends early.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. voseo (tenés) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: El sol brilla sobre el mar azul y tranquilo.
ipa: el ˈsol ˈbɾiʝa ˈsobɾe el ˈmaɾ aˈsul i tɾaˈnkilo
gloss_en: The sun shines over the blue, calm sea.
notes: seseo ⟨c/z⟩ merged to [s]; yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.
